decontamination_notes: Original scenario authored for VulcanBench on 2026-05-30; not derived from any public repository, issue, or dataset, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: wrong_type
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^reports wrong type for present field$' tests/validate.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: missing_and_type
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^reports both missing and type errors together$' tests/validate.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: valid_object_no_errors
pass_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^fully valid object yields no errors$' tests/validate.test.ts
